name: the review queue --auto-accept stages the high-confidence zero-gap rules for batched commit
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/draft-custom-rule.sh" --rule-id g-clean --tool eslint --prose 'Never use var.' --json > d.json 2>/dev/null; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/review-queue.sh" --in d.json --auto-accept --json > q.json 2>e.txt; grep -q 'staged=1' e.txt && node -e 'const j=require(process.cwd()+"/q.json");if(!j.staged.includes("g-clean"))process.exit(1)' && echo auto-accepted 1>&2
